children.text: Display, server, session, and theme controls
Used as the default multiplayer uplink.
Choose the monitor profile for the command deck.
Choose the backbuffer size used in windowed or fullscreen mode.
Switch between a resizable window and fullscreen output.
Scales Myra menus, panels, buttons, and window chrome.
Accent colors live here. Geometry and scale are unified across gameplay and Myra surfaces, so there are no separate spacing or chrome controls.
Primary action, selection, and focus color.
Headings, warnings, and secondary data highlights.
